creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Good catch.

I'm not sure how this is possible but this one actually compiles and also work even without this option with all asterisk versions.

Only chance is that the differences between the versions we have in the ports tree are similar enough.

Anyway I'd rather patch it so that the correct flags are passed since you noticed this problem. I'll commit a fix after some tests.

Thanks!
